products.title: InstantSite Library
products.tagline: Pre-Built Website Platform for Small Businesses
products.description: A library of pre-designed websites tailored for small businesses. Each business gets instant access to a ready-made site plus a simple dashboard to edit name, services, images, contact, branding. Conversion-optimized templates, mobile-friendly, SEO-ready, with built-in Google Maps reviews integration. Launch in minutes, not months.
products.subject_line: Your business deserves a website. Here's one — already built.
products.why_works: Most businesses don't invest in websites because they see them as expensive. Standardized templates + auto-reviews reframe websites as a 5-minute decision.

products.title: ClaimYourSite
products.description: Scrape Google Maps for businesses without websites. Build a fully designed single-page site using the scraped business data. Email the owner a preview and invite them to 'claim' it. The only initial decision is yes or no — no planning, designing, or building. Edits and upsells come after they opt in.
products.subject_line: Your website is ready. Click to claim it.
wins: Zero upfront effort for the buyer
Yes/no is the only first decision
products.why_works: We present them with a ready-made solution. The only initial decision is yes or no — adoption skyrockets compared to start-from-scratch pitches.

products.title: ReputationLift
products.description: An add-on service that improves the business's online reputation across Google Maps and review platforms. Combines with the website offer to create a complete online presence solution — more visibility, more trust signals, more conversions from local search.
products.subject_line: Your competitors have more reviews. Let's fix that.
wins: Trust signals stack with website offer
before_bullets: No system for asking happy customers
products.why_works: Most owners care about one thing: more exposure, more customers. Reputation + website together compound discoverability and trust.
